description: Analyze social review sentiment for a specific cruise line, ship, or destination. Use when a user asks about a particular cruise product.

Broad social media trend research across the cruise industry. Use when a user asks what people are saying about cruising in general, what is trending, what a specific demographic thinks about cruising, or what is emerging in the cruise world. Supports filtering by traveler perspective (gen_z, millennial, gen_x, boomer, family, solo, luxury, budget) and topic category.

input_schema.perspective: gen_z | millennial | gen_x | boomer | family | solo | luxury | budget | null
input_schema.category: overall_industry | dining_and_food | onboard_entertainment | shore_excursions | value_and_pricing | sustainability | technology_and_connectivity | health_and_wellness

thoughts_stream_label: Researching cruise trends across social media...
